items.name: Press Vest
items.description:
[This vest was made with a tailoring app, and then scaled to be on a R6 rig.  This is NOT a rip.]

Whether in a shady place, or at your hometown, the press vest is a important article of clothing to display your affiliation with civilians and not the military. This vest is commonly worn by War Correspondants.

Goes with https://www.roblox.com/catalog/111778191901185/Press-Helmet 
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/117743064825531/CAMON-DSLR-Camera-Vest

- Made by ericloloehm2deleted1 with wicked tailoring
